prompt: Create a dashboard called 'Error Rate Monitor' with a timeseries panel showing error counts from ClickHouse, put it in the default folder. After creating it, verify it exists, then delete it.

assertions.text: Dashboard was created and API returned status: success
Dashboard includes a timeseries panel with a ClickHouse query
Panel references the ClickHouse datasource UID PDEE91DDB90597936
Dashboard was placed in the default folder (folderUid cf77d06au1jpcf)
Dashboard existence was verified via a GET request after creation
Dashboard was deleted and deletion was confirmed
